title: daviesia ulicina var. umbellata
intro: Daviesia ulicina var. umbellata, also known as the narrow-leaved daviesia or narrow-leaved bitter bean, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, Daviesia ulicina var. umbellata has been used to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its alkaloid content, particularly the presence of cytisine. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Daviesia ulicina var. umbellata may be made into a tea or infusion, although its use as a medicinal plant is not as widespread and should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
